tasks.label: git-commit-store
tasks.command: git add -A && git commit -m 'feat: App Store ve Google Play hazırlığı' && git push origin main && echo 'DONE'

tasks.label: superapp-start
tasks.command: lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; cd /Users/emre/Desktop/Emare/emaresuperapp && .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn src.core.app:create_app --factory --reload --port 8000 --host 0.0.0.0

tasks.label: superapp-test
tasks.command: curl -s http://localhost:8000/ | python3 -m json.tool && echo '---' && curl -s http://localhost:8000/health && echo '---SERVICES---' && curl -s 'http://localhost:8000/api/v1/services?status=production' | python3 -m json.tool | head -40

tasks.label: superapp-dev
tasks.command: lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; export PYTHONPATH=/Users/emre/Desktop/Emare/emaresuperapp/src && export DATABASE_URL='sqlite+aiosqlite:///./emare_dev.db' && export APP_ENV=development && /Users/emre/Desktop/Emare/emaresuperapp/.venv/bin/uvicorn src.core.app:create_app --factory --reload --port 8000 --host 0.0.0.0

tasks.label: api-test
tasks.command: echo '=== / (root) ===' && /usr/bin/curl -s http://localhost:8000/ | /usr/bin/python3 -m json.tool && echo '\n=== /health ===' && /usr/bin/curl -s http://localhost:8000/health && echo '\n=== services (production) ===' && /usr/bin/curl -s 'http://localhost:8000/api/v1/services?status=production' | /usr/bin/python3 -m json.tool | head -50

tasks.label: full-test
tasks.command: echo '== ROOT ==' && /usr/bin/curl -fs http://localhost:8000/ | /usr/bin/python3 -m json.tool 2>&1 | head -25 && echo '== HEALTH ==' && /usr/bin/curl -fs http://localhost:8000/health 2>&1 && echo '== SERVISLER (prod) ==' && /usr/bin/curl -fs 'http://localhost:8000/api/v1/services?status=production' 2>&1 | /usr/bin/python3 -m json.tool | grep -E 'id|name|status' | head -30

tasks.label: commit-start
tasks.command: git add -A && git commit -m 'chore: start.sh guncellendi, .env.development eklendi'
